headline: A Look At CVS Health (CVS) Valuation After Earnings Beat And Raised 2026 Guidance
summary: CVS Health (CVS) is back in focus after first quarter 2026 results and raised full year guidance, with management highlighting broad based strength across Aetna, Health Services, and Pharmacy & Consumer Wellness. See our latest analysis for CVS Health. After the earnings beat and guidance raise, the share price has climbed to US$90.55, with a 1 month share price return of 14.14% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 44.83%. This suggests momentum has picked up recently compared with longer...
